name: Sopa De Nopales (Cactus Soup)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Tomatillos - husks removed, rinsed and coarsely chopped
1 package Sliced cactus (33 oz) - packed in water, drained and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cactus looks forbidding. Stripped of its prickly points, however, it is a mild-mannered vegetable with a slightly tart flavor. Look for easy-to-use canned cactus (sold as NOPALES or NOPALITOS) in supermarkets and Mexican groceries.
2. In a 4-5 quart pan over medium heat, stir oil and onion. Cook, stirring often, until onion is golden, about 15 minutes.
3. Add tomatillos; cook, stirring often, just until soft, about 6 minutes.
4. Add broth; bring to a boil over high heat.
5. Stir in cactus, lime juice, and cilantro. Cook until hot.
6. Ladle soup into a tureen.
7. Offer cheese to add to taste.
8. Accompany with lime wedges.
